title: taraxacum crispulum
intro: Taraxacum crispulum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, known for its jagged or wavy leaves. It is often used in herbal medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Taraxacum crispulum can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
